## Summary
Describe the change in 1-3 bullets.

## Validation
- [ ] `.\tr.cmd --help`
- [ ] `.\tr.cmd --version`
- [ ] Unit tests
- [ ] Smoke tests
- [ ] Manual Windows relay check (if runtime behavior changed)

## Checklist
- [ ] Updated docs/config examples if behavior changed
- [ ] Added or updated tests
- [ ] Kept the documented scope honest
